ops.text: Optimize storage: implement 12-hour dump governor and Gzip compression

ops.replace_with:
private fun encryptBytes(data: ByteArray): ByteArray {
        val iv = ByteArray(12)
        SecureRandom().nextBytes(iv)
        val spec = GCMParameterSpec(128, iv)
        
        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES/GCM/NoPadding")
        val secretKey = SecretKeySpec(KEY, "AES")
        cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, secretKey, spec)
        
        val ciphertext = cipher.doFinal(data)
        
        val combined = ByteArray(iv.size + ciphertext.size)
        System.arraycopy(iv, 0, combined, 0, iv.size)
        System.arraycopy(ciphertext, 0, combined, iv.size, ciphertext.size)
        return combined
    }

operations.replace_with:
private fun encryptBytes(data: ByteArray): ByteArray {
        val iv = ByteArray(12)
        SecureRandom().nextBytes(iv)
        val spec = GCMParameterSpec(128, iv)
        
        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES/GCM/NoPadding")
        val secretKey = SecretKeySpec(KEY, "AES")
        cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, secretKey, spec)
        
        val ciphertext = cipher.doFinal(data)
        
        val combined = ByteArray(iv.size + ciphertext.size)
        System.arraycopy(iv, 0, combined, 0, iv.size)
        System.arraycopy(ciphertext, 0, combined, iv.size, ciphertext.size)
        return combined
    }

ops.text: Add Summary Modal to Edge Function Bulk Sync (Merge)
Migrate Build Android APK workflow to use Release signing logic from DNS Guard v2.0-STABLE

ops.find_block:
- name: Run Lint Analysis
        run: gradle lintDebug

      - name: Build APK
        run: gradle assembleDebug

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk
ops.replace_with:
- name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Sign APK
        run: |
          # 1. Decode Keystore
          echo "${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 2. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          
          # 3. Zipalign
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 4. Sign
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

      - name: Upload Signed APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk

operations.find_block:

      - name: Upload APK

          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk
operations.replace_with:
- name: Build Release APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Sign APK
        run: |
          # 1. Decode Keystore
          echo "${{ secrets.SIGNING_KEY }}" | base64 -di > app/release.jks
          
          # 2. Locate SDK Tools
          BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)
          
          # 3. Zipalign
          UNSIGNED_APK=$(find app/build/outputs/apk/release -name "*release-unsigned.apk" -o -name "*release.apk" | head -1)
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/zipalign -v 4 "$UNSIGNED_APK" app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

          # 4. Sign
          $BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/apksigner sign --ks app/release.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_STORE_PASSWORD }}" \
            --ks-key-alias "${{ secrets.ALIAS }}" \
            --key-pass pass:"${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}" \
            --out app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-aligned.apk

      - name: Upload Signed APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-v2-stable
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/dns-guard-v2-stable.apk
